name: Apple 'n' Nut Crackers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup toasted and ground pecans or walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together the all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, toasted and ground pecans or walnuts, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon or apple pie spice.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut in butter or margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
4. Add applesauce all at once. Using a fork, stir the mixture until it can be gathered into a ball.
5. Divide the dough in half.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Lightly grease baking sheets and set aside.
8. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each half of the dough into a rectangle measuring 12 x 7-1/2 inches.
9. Using a pastry wheel or a sharp knife, cut the dough into 1-1/2-inch squares, triangles, or diamond shapes. Alternatively, using a 1-1/2-inch round cookie or biscuit cutter, cut the dough into rounds.
10. Place crackers on prepared baking sheets, spacing them about 1/4 inch apart. Using the tines of a fork, prick each cracker several times.
11. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes, or until lightly brown and firm to the touch. Remove crackers from the baking sheets and cool on wire racks. Store in an air-tight container in a cool place.
